ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Walking, Running, Jogging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., aerobic, anaerobic) */,
  "calorie_burn_rate" REAL /* Calorie burn rate per minute for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the data belongs to */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the activity */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the activity */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the activity */,
  "support" INTEGER /* Support of the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used to track the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, trainer, athlete) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., wearable, mobile) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the log belongs to */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the log belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity in meters */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., meters, calories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_metrics_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was activated for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_tags_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the log belongs to */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the log belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity in meters */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation belongs to */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_recommendations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_athletes" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id", "athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_athletes" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id", "athlete_id")
)
